author: Anytraderr
jtrevorchapman
text:
@Anytraderr Looks incredible. 

What are you using to code this? Explain to the AI the issue: different market sessions should fall into different strategies. Let it know you need to identify the trend, you need to track volatility from market to market, and ask how a quant firm would do so.
